positive: A detailed, watercolor illustration of a hidden forest glen, featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate fern fronds, and a small, crystal-clear stream. Soft ambient lighting, whimsical cottagecore aesthetic, hyper-detailed, concept art, by Studio Ghibli and William Robinson.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, noise, grain
